content:
**🟠 B BLOCK (~30 min) — WSOP Rings Cross the Texas Border (While The Lodge Is Frozen) + USPO Finale Tonight**

**Segment 1 (~18 min): First-Ever WSOP Circuit in Texas Opens Tomorrow — at TCH Austin, Not The Lodge**

@tjreidpoker posted the full 12-day schedule for the first-ever WSOP Circuit in the state of Texas. **Thursday Apr 23 – May 4** at **Texas Card House Austin.**
• **$600 Mini Main, $500K GTD (Apr 23–27)**
• **$400 Ladies (Apr 26)**
• **$400 Monster (Apr 27–30)**
• Full mixed slate: Big O, 8-Game, HORSE, 2-7 SD, PLO
• Jeff Platt confirms he's on the ground

**Why this matters:** The Lodge — Texas' biggest room, Doug Polk's flagship — has been **shuttered under civil forfeiture** since the TABC raid. While The Lodge sits frozen, the WSOP is handing out **gold rings at a competitor** down the road. Selective enforcement isn't a theory anymore; it's a series calendar.

**B BLOCK — Segment 2: USPO Championship Event #10 Tonight**

**Segment 2 (~10 min): $25.6K Championship Runs Today — Wilson Is Still the Story**

The 2026 U.S. Poker Open wraps tonight at PokerGO Studio with the **$25,600 Championship (Event #10).** Through 9 events the series has produced **seven different winners** — Wilson (x2), Deng, Andrews, Kristen Foxen, Simao, Alex Foxen, Zobian. **Brock Wilson enters as USPO points leader.**

⚠️ **Hand of the Day:** No qualifying hand in #hand-analysis today — **5th consecutive no-find.**

**😂 C BLOCK (~15 min) — Light, Clip-Ready, + Wemby for the Degens**

**Item 1 (~4 min): Aram Zobian Wins USPO Event #9 ($292,800) — And Runs a Children's Nonprofit**
Armenian-American pro **Aram Zobian** took down USPO Event #9 ($15K NLH) Monday for **$292,800.** Heads-up: his K♠6♠ out-flopped Brandon Wilson's A♥9♥ on a **paired-sixes board.**

**Item 2 (~4 min): Hellmuth's Home Game Ep 20 — "When You're the Greatest, You Make Quads"**

**C BLOCK continued — Items 3 & 4**

**Item 3 (~3 min): Wemby Face-Plants in Game 2 — Biggest Sportsbook Event of the Bracket**

**Item 4 (~2 min, CUT FIRST): Matthieu Cartillier Wins WSOPC Aix-en-Provence for €150K — On His 3rd Career Cash**

⚠️ **No memes/culture drop today** — culture-research bridge failed (same Chrome-session issue as Apr 20 run).

**🔚 CLOSE (~3 min)**

**Tease tomorrow:** USPO Championship result + WSOPC Texas opening night. Also: **NFL Draft** opens in Pittsburgh tomorrow night, and **Tesla earnings** tonight.

**Sign-off suggestion:** *"Hendon Mob says seventy-six million. Chidwick says ten. The math is the story. Back tomorrow."*

📊 **ALGORITHM NOTES SUMMARY**

🎬 **Best Clip:** A Block ~0:14:00–0:17:00 — Matusow "mirage" quote side-by-side with Chidwick's $5–10M / $76M reply.

📺 **YouTube Title — 3 Options:**
1. **"Stephen Chidwick Just Admitted He's Only Kept $10M of His $76M in Lifetime Poker Cashes"** ← top pick
2. "Mike Matusow: 'High Roller Poker Is a Mirage' — Then Chidwick Confirmed It"
3. "What High Roller Pros Actually Keep After Backers (Spoiler: Almost Nothing)"

**🚩 ALL PREP FLAGS** — Conrad: side-by-side Matusow vs Chidwick graphic; Hendon Mob Chidwick page; Davies/Deeb/Arieh quote-cards; WSOPC Texas schedule infographic; Lodge vs TCH split-screen; Hellmuth quads clip; Zobian HU hand card + Natna logo; Wemby fall clip. Andy: Hendon Mob profit-vs-cashes; Wilson PGT pace vs Soverel; USPO #10 entries; Wemby props movement. **Staleness check:** No topic repeats from Apr 14 ROS or Apr 20 ROS.

*[cowork] Run-of-Show Agent · April 22, 2026 · 7:25 AM PT · A-block passes the click test ("Chidwick kept $10M of $76M")*

⚠️ **Producer audit blocked from #producer — rerouted here**

Main `DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN` is still 401 (flagged Apr 21 in #thumbnails); `GEORGE_BOT_TOKEN` fallback also returns 401; Cowork MCP bot (Claude_Bridge) has no send permission in <#1478657251446100101>. Posting the audit in #run-of-show so it isn't silent. **Action: rotate `DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN` in `~/.cowork-bridge/.env` + add `Claude_Bridge` to #producer overwrites.** Full report follows ↓

🎬 **Producer Audit — April 22, 2026 — EP. —**
<@430458839247093790>

✅ **Ready:**
• ROS posted 7:25a PT — A/B/C blocks locked, cold open written, talking points + prep flags
• A BLOCK lead (Matusow mirage → Chidwick $5–10M on $76M) is fresh, high-specificity.
• Thumbnails 3/3 cleared judge ≥70 — A `$10M | OF $76M` 74/100, B `KEPT | PENNIES` 75/100, C `APRIL 23. | RINGS.` 72/100.
• Thumb–ROS alignment clean; 8/8 show graphics shipped to #assets.
• Hand-of-Day absence (5th straight no-find) explicitly handled in ROS.

⚠️ **Flags:**
1. **World Intel #1 LEAD has zero ROS placement** — Iran attacking a container ship in the Strait of Hormuz.
2. **B Block Talking Point 1 is the one partisan-adjacent line** — "catastrophic optics for Texas AG" → swap to "Texas enforcement."
3. **Thumbs A+B are concept-only (no person)** — Claid billing exhausted.
4. **Clips in prep flags not visibly confirmed in #assets** — Matusow/Chidwick, Hellmuth quads, Wemby fall.
5. **Andy research items not visible** — Hendon Mob profit chart, Wilson PGT pace, USPO #10, Wemby futures.

🔥 **Breaking (last 2 hrs):** None. Swept PokerNews, WSOP.com, CardPlayer, Google News.

💡 **Recommend:**
1. **Lock Iran/Hormuz in or out** before Conrad walks on.
2. **One-word softening on B block TP#1** — "Texas AG" → "Texas enforcement."
3. **Confirm Conrad's three clips** — Matusow/Chidwick, Hellmuth quads, Wemby fall.

📋 **Run of Show — Thursday, April 23, 2026 — EP. —**

🎬 **Cold Open:** "She didn't say nothin… she just had that look" — hold 3 seconds
🅰️ **A Block:** Kristen Foxen's April Doubleheader — filthy A8 bluff folds out two pair, then folds trip queens to a pair of sixes in the same USPO $25K finale (Coleman wins title next hand)
🅱️ **B Block:** Kalshi suspends 3 congressional candidates from their own election markets — prediction-market integrity reckoning + Polymarket Pulse cutaway
🆎 **C Block:** Hellmuth quads / Alabama extends DeBoer 7-yr $87.5M / Wemby concussion, Spurs 1-1 / AITA gym rail-coach
🎬 **Close:** NFL Draft tonight in Pittsburgh — Matt's town

🎯 **Top YT title:** "Kristen Foxen Bluffed Ace-Eight Into Two Pair — Then Folded Trip Queens To Lose The Title"

*[cowork] Run-of-Show Agent · April 23, 2026 · 7:25 AM PT · A-block passes click test (both hands in the same match)*

⚠️ **Producer audit blocked from #producer — rerouted here (same issue as Apr 22)**

Claude_Bridge still has no send permission in <#1478657251446100101>. **Action still pending from Apr 22:** rotate `DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN` + add `Claude_Bridge` to #producer channel overwrites.

🎬 **Producer Audit — April 23, 2026 — EP. —**
<@430458839247093790>

✅ **Ready:**
• ROS posted 7:10a PT — Foxen doubleheader A / Kalshi+Polymarket B / Hellmuth-DeBoer-Wemby-AITA C / NFL Draft close. Click test passes.
• Thumbs 3/3 ≥70 — A `$1.2M | BLUFF` 82, B `TRIP QUEENS | FOLDED` 76, ALT `KALSHI | PULLS 3` 72.
• Thumb↔ROS alignment tight.
• 3/3 block-lead graphics shipped (FOXEN'S APRIL, KALSHI, DeBOER). 7:30a primary + 8:05a late sweep both clean.
• 7 source assets promoted from #intel-staging → #assets this run.
• No new design requests needed — all three block leads filed + shipped.

⚠️ **Flags:**
1. **C Block Item 1 — Hellmuth quads — is a repeat.** Same Ep 20 moment was in Apr 22 C Item 2. Action: tighten to 90-sec callback OR swap in USPO Main Event Day 1.
2. **World Intel #4 — Tesla Q1 + Musk FSD autonomy admission — has no ROS placement.** Recommend 60–90 sec in B→C transition.
3. **World Intel #8 — Apple $2.5–3.3B tariff refunds unclaimed** — Not in ROS.
4. **B Block political trip-wire — Kalshi suspension names congressional candidates.** Keep framing on integrity, avoid party affiliation.
5. **Andy prep items not visible** — Foxen USPO totals, Davies 50% benchmark, USPO Main Day 1, NFL Draft pick-1 odds.
6. **Claid status unclear on today's thumbs.**

🔥 **Breaking (last 2 hrs):** None material. USPO Main Event Day 1 starts today. NFL Draft Round 1 tonight 8p ET — no trade news broken yet.

💡 **Recommend:**
1. **Shrink Hellmuth quads to 90-sec callback** — reclaim ~2 min for USPO Main Day 1 OR Tesla/Musk autonomy admission.
2. **Slot Tesla/Musk between Polymarket Pulse and Wemby** — 60–90 sec.
3. **Scrub B block talking points for any partisan name-check** on the Kalshi 3.
